procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1041
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1041 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

sigma.title: Network Communication Initiated To Portmap.IO Domain

osquery.name: t1041_exfil_net
osquery.query_text: SELECT p.pid, p.name, p.cmdline, s.remote_address, s.remote_port FROM process_open_sockets s JOIN processes p ON s.pid = p.pid WHERE s.remote_address != '' AND s.remote_address NOT LIKE '127.%' AND s.remote_address NOT LIKE '10.%' AND s.remote_address NOT LIKE '192.168.%' LIMIT 100;

sigma_matches.title: Network Communication Initiated To Portmap.IO Domain

executions.reason: Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence
Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 3 direct run(s), 2/2 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
